summary: Sprint 13 — ARENAKORE ID Recovery Flow tested end-to-end. All 10 backend pytest tests PASS (forgot-password, verify-otp, reset-password). Full frontend flow tested via Playwright: RECUPERA ACCESSO link → /recover screen → email input → OTP boxes → password reset → ACCESSO RIPRISTINATO success screen. All 14 test scenarios from review_request verified. chicago@arena.com restored to original password (testpassword123).

minor.issue: Passlib warning on startup: 'AttributeError: module bcrypt has no attribute __about__'. Bcrypt itself still works correctly (passwords hash/verify fine). Non-breaking.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing console warnings: 'shadow* style props deprecated', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated'. Non-breaking.

critical_code_review_comments: OTP is SHA256-hashed in DB (hashlib.sha256) — correct. Not bcrypt (intentional: OTP is short-lived/disposable, SHA256 is sufficient).
reset_token is a JWT signed with SECRET_KEY, type=password_reset, 15-minute expiry — correctly implemented.
Anti-enumeration: non-existent email returns generic status=sent without dev_otp — correct security behavior.
Email delivery is MOCKED — OTP returned as dev_otp in response. Remove in production before launch.
dev_otp displayed in DEV banner on OTP screen in gold (#D4AF37) — only visible in development. Should be env-gated in production.

feature_test_results.forgot_password_existing_user: PASS — status=sent, dev_otp (6-digit numeric) returned for admin@arenadare.com
feature_test_results.forgot_password_nonexistent_email: PASS — generic status=sent returned, NO dev_otp (anti-enumeration correct)
feature_test_results.reset_password_success: PASS — status=success, bcrypt hash updated in DB
feature_test_results.reset_password_short: PASS — 400 returned for password shorter than 8 chars
feature_test_results.login_after_reset: PASS — login with new password succeeds (bcrypt verified)
feature_test_results.login_recover_link: PASS — RECUPERA ACCESSO link visible on /login screen (testID: login-recover-link)
feature_test_results.recover_navigation: PASS — Clicking RECUPERA ACCESSO navigates to /recover URL
feature_test_results.recover_step1_ui: PASS — ARENAKORE (gold rgb(212,175,55)), ID RECOVERY, STEP 01, email input, INVIA CODICE OTP all present
feature_test_results.recover_step2_otp: PASS — 6 OTP boxes visible, DEV OTP banner (gold), VERIFICA CODICE button, REINVIA CODICE link
feature_test_results.recover_full_flow: PASS — email → OTP → new password → ACCESSO RIPRISTINATO → ACCEDI ORA → /login

mocked_apis: Email OTP delivery: dev_otp returned in /api/auth/forgot-password response (DEV MODE only)
seed_data_creation: None. chicago@arena.com password restored to testpassword123 after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ID Recovery flow fully tested and passing. Login: chicago@arena.com / testpassword123 (restored). Admin: admin@arenadare.com / Admin2026!. OTP flow works end-to-end. Password restored after testing. bcrypt passlib startup warning is pre-existing and non-breaking. All testIDs verified: login-recover-link, recovery-email-input, send-otp-btn, otp-box-0..5, verify-otp-btn, new-password-input, confirm-password-input, reset-password-btn, go-to-login-btn.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All flows functioning correctly. The bcrypt passlib __about__ warning is a library version mismatch (bcrypt 4.x removed __about__) but passlib handles it gracefully and hashing/verification work correctly.
